hero.title: Universal AI Search MCP
hero.subtitle: Zero API keys. Scrapes search engines directly and returns cited answers. Built for any MCP client.

free.title: 100% Free
free.desc: No OpenAI, no Google API, no Bing API. Only direct scraping.

citations.title: Citation-Native
citations.desc: Every result gets a [1], [2] ID. LLMs can cite sources accurately.

multi.title: Multi-Engine
multi.desc: SearchEngineRegistry makes adding new scrapers trivial.

code.title: Code-Aware
code.desc: Detects 21 languages, extracts API signatures, measures code-to-text ratio.

tools.title: 8 Tools
tools.desc: From quick answers to deep research.
tools.answer: Direct cited answer to any question
tools.web_search: Scrape search engines, return ranked results with citation IDs
tools.search_with_citations: Search with pre-numbered citations for academic writing
tools.fetch_page: Extract clean content from a single URL
tools.deep_research: Auto-expand query, crawl top results, synthesize with citations
tools.stealthy_fetch: Full anti-bot bypass for protected sites
